Dear Park Office,

I am writing to ask about picnic spot availability next Saturday.
We hope to find a large area that is available for our group.
Our team needs this space to host a special community celebration event.
The intended date for our gathering is June fifteenth of this year.
We plan to have exactly fifty people attend this wonderful outdoor function.
Please confirm if the requested location matches our specific dietary and setup needs.
It is vital that we confirm the details before we book our travel.
Without this confirmation, our entire plan might fall apart like a house of cards.
We need to know if the tables and grills are available for use.
Your quick reply will help us avoid any last minute stress or worry.
We truly appreciate your time and effort in helping us organize this day.
Thank you very much for considering our request with such care and attention.
We look forward to hearing from you soon regarding our upcoming plans.
Looking forward to your response.
